overallVerdict: 9-screen architecture and React consolidation remain correct. Reports underestimated backend work by 12-15 dev-days, overestimated data complexity (121 low-conf vs thousands), and assumed API capabilities that don't exist. 2 screens MISALIGNED (require new backend), 5 PARTIALLY_ALIGNED (design adjustments), 2 CONFIRMED. Timeline extends to 8 weeks.
